zh.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley是William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow的女兒，於1375年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾。她於1407年3月與Roger Giffard在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley是William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow的女儿，于1375年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾。她于1407年3月与Roger Giffard在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella

meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley was born in 1375, in Buckinghamshire, England as the daughter of William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow. She married Roger Giffard in March 1407, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1415, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley est née en 1375, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow. Elle a épousé Roger Giffard en mars 1407, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1415, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley wurde 1375 in Buckinghamshire, England, als Tochter von William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow geboren. Sie hat im März 1407 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England Roger Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1415 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley è nata il nel 1375 nel Buckinghamshire, England come figlia di William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow. Lei sposato Roger Giffard nel marzo 1407, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1415, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, Unite: イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretleyは1375年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでWilliam de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslowの娘として生まれた。1407年3月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでRoger Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley(은)는 1375년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1407년 3월 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 Roger Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

Twyford, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley nasceu em 1375, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow. Ela casou-se com Roger Giffard em março de 1407, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1415, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley родилась в 1375 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Giffard марта 1407 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1415 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabella de Stretley nació en 1375, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de William de Stretley Lord of Mentmore and Creslow. Se casó con Roger Giffard en marzo de 1407, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1415, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
